stemHtml: Consider a turbine engine aeroplane, with two underwing engines, fitted with two wing tanks and one centre tank. If all centre tank fuel booster pumps fail…

options.a: Fuel starvation may occur, which could lead to engine flame-out.
options.b: Part or all of the fuel in the centre tank is considered unusable.
options.c: Fuel imbalance shall occur during high thrust settings.
options.d: Thrust deterioration may occur at high altitudes.
